heading: Omitted
label: 613 to 613e Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 613, , , related to reduction in area of Gila project.act July 30, 1947, ch. 382, § 161 Stat. 628Section 613a, , , related to acquisition of property within or adjacent to Gila project.act July 30, 1947, ch. 382, § 261 Stat. 628Section 613b, , , related to authority of Secretary of the Interior to dispose of land within Gila project.act July 30, 1947, ch. 382, § 361 Stat. 629Section 613c, , , related to applicability of project land to State laws and liability of such land for assessments and taxes.act July 30, 1947, ch. 382, § 461 Stat. 629Section 613d, , , related to repayment of construction costs for Gila project in installments.act July 30, 1947, ch. 382, § 561 Stat. 629Section 613e, , , related to powers of Secretary of the Interior and his duly authorized representatives.act July 30, 1947, ch. 382, § 761 Stat. 630

Reclamation Law; Amendment of Other Laws, , provided that this subchapter be deemed a supplement to the reclamation law and that nothing in this subchapter be construed to amend subchapter I of chapter 12A of this title.Act July 30, 1947, ch. 382, § 861 Stat. 630
